candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line with values; more specific and less subtotal-like than total wrappers.
Revenue total line matching the same values; suitable fallback if the more specific revenue label is unavailable in some years.
Header/grouping row, not the actual populated revenue line.

variables.notes: Used populated revenue lines as priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value, not sum them.

candidates.why: Best semantic match for direct cost of sales / cost of revenue.
Total cost of revenues line, but less preferred than the more direct component-style label.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Industry-specific total row and appears irrelevant here.
Could be a cost-of-revenue variant, but less standard and less direct than Cost of Operating Revenue.
Balance-sheet inventory line, not an income-statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the most semantically correct direct cost line. It appears present even if preview values are blank.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Best explicit SG&A overhead line and already excludes R&D, which is ideal for PROF's SG&A-minus-R&D construction.
Overhead component but narrower and less complete than the explicit SG&A excluding R&D line.
Too broad; would include non-SG&A items and should be avoided when explicit SG&A exists.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but should not be included when chosen SG&A row explicitly excludes R&D and we want to avoid double counting in XSGA.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. An explicit populated SG&A row exists and is preferable. Because it explicitly excludes R&D, no separate R&D row was added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT and clearly the best semantic match.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental R&D disclosure; less preferred than the main income-statement R&D line.
Supplemental duplicate of R&D expense; less preferred than the primary line.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This explicitly excludes R&D, so it is not an R&D line.
Section header, not the expense row.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Although a dedicated R&D line exists, the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS row explicitly excludes R&D. Per the provided rule, XRD is set to empty in this case to avoid an inconsistent SG&A-minus-R&D treatment.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line; best simple match for financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Also a good recurring interest expense measure, but appears to overlap with Interest Expense and would risk double counting if both were selected.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component, but likely already included in total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Semantically relevant but appears unpopulated and may overlap with other interest rows.

variables.notes: Selected a single direct interest expense row to avoid double counting overlapping interest lines and lease-interest components.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line and preferred because BE should exclude non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Also parent-only equity and useful as fallback if the first label is missing in some years.
Could represent common equity, but parent-attributable labels are more explicit and preferred.
Common equity line with matching values; acceptable fallback.
Equity proxy, but less direct than the explicit parent-attributable equity line.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Would risk including minority interest; only use if no parent-only equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Used parent-attributable equity lines as priority list so BE excludes any non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Could indicate a total including minority interest, but values match parent equity exactly, suggesting no separate minority interest is present.
Income-statement line, not a balance-sheet minority interest stock variable.
Income-statement line, not a balance-sheet minority interest stock variable.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income-statement line, not the required balance-sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Debt - including Preferred Equity & Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Debt/capital structure line, not a clean minority interest equity line.

variables.notes: No separate minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present. Total equity including minority equals parent equity, so MIB is treated as zero.
